adr_entry: No ADR required. The plan adds `src/render/applyAtmosphere.ts` and modifies existing render-layer modules (`createScene.ts`, `sceneParamsChanged.ts`, `initRenderer.ts`), all within the established `src/render/` conventions documented in ADR-004. Three.js is already an established dependency (v0.184.0). No new dependencies, no new browser APIs, no structural departures. The `fog` and `lightIntensity` fields already exist in `SceneParams` and `snapshotToScene` — this ticket wires them to actual three.js scene properties. The only architectural decision of note is the `sceneParamsChanged` split (geometry vs atmosphere), which is a localized change within `initRenderer.ts`'s update path.
